title: Consolidated Advisory Readiness Report — Final Decision
final_decision_rationale: All safety gates passed. 9 recovery templates defined, all advisory-only, auto_executable=False everywhere. 30 cycles validated with 0 auto_exec violations. Dominant recommendation (continue_from_partial_progress) is actionable and non-trivial: it distinguishes targeted recovery from cold restart. Decision: candidate_for_advisory_rollout. This does NOT activate rollout. Activation requires explicit operator approval and integration into reporting pipeline.
summary: EPIC #886 complete. 9 recovery templates, all advisory-only. 30 cycles validated. auto_executable_violations=0. Final decision: candidate_for_advisory_rollout. No auto-execution. No mandatory gate. Default off.

findings.finding: All 9 recovery templates are advisory-only with auto_executable=False
30/30 cycles receive a valid recovery recommendation
Evidence completeness: 20/30 cycles (new) have full evidence; 10 (baseline) are partial
No auto-execution paths exist anywhere in the module
findings.evidence: auto_executable_violations=0 across all templates and all cycles.

recommendations.recommendation: Surface recovery_recommendation in execution reports (diagnostic_only mode, opt-in)
recommendations.rationale: Safe, advisory-only, reversible. Adds recovery context beyond raw loop failure.

recommendations.recommendation: Do NOT auto-execute any recovery recommendation
recommendations.rationale: Recommendations are advisory. Execution must always require explicit human/operator action.

recommendations.recommendation: Backfill goal_class in baseline cycles to improve evidence completeness
recommendations.rationale: 10 baseline cycles lack goal_class → evidence_missing for required fields.

recommendations.recommendation: Validate recovery recommendations on diverse run outcomes before expanded rollout
recommendations.rationale: 30/30 cycles are (failed, partial) — only 1 of 9 templates exercised on real data.
